title: SRO 201 DATED 19 NOV 1996
text: EXTRACT FROM GAZETTE OF INDIA DATED 07 DEC 96 PART- II SECTION -4 New Delhi the 19th November 1996 S.R.O. 201 – In exercise of powers conferred by Sub- Section (1) read Clause (a), (d), (e), (f), (k) and (1) of Sub-Section (2) of Section 123 of the Coast Guard Act, 1978 (30 of 1978), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, namely:- 1. These rules may be called the Coast Guard (General) Rules. 1996. 2. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, after Rules 25, the following rule 25- A shall be inserted namely :- “25-A. Dismissal of deserted :- A person subject to the Act who being a deserted from services is not apprehended or does not surrender, shall be dismissed from service under section 11 of the Act, as under:- (a) after five years from the date of desertion in case where desertion is :- (i) with arms or lethal weapons, (ii) due to subsersive or espionage activities. (iii) committed in addition to any other offence, (b) after three years from date of desertion in cases other than in (a) above”. (File No. OF/0608) S.L. BUNKER, Director (GG). -- 1 of 1 --
